title: 日本ダービーの後に・さらに高みへ

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
Fuji Kiseki has taken the crowd with her
mesmerizing performance!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: Huff! Wheeze! Huff!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Chatter, chatter!

text_block_list.name: Spectator A
text_block_list.text:
She's about to keel over! I guess she wasn't
kidding when she said she's better suited to mile
races...

text_block_list.name: Spectator B
text_block_list.text: Y-you did great, Fuji Kiseki! I'm rooting for you!

text_block_list.name: Spectator C
text_block_list.text: You were fantastic! I was so moved!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Fuji Kiseki stands up straight amid the cheering
voices.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: Huff... Huff... Haha! Thank you, everyone!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She holds her fist proudly above her head before
the crowd.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Fan Club Member A
text_block_list.text:
Ahhh! People are so worried for her, but they're
cheering for her too! O-oh my gosh, she looks so
graceful kneeling like that!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Fan Club Member B
text_block_list.text:
Don't forget she's an entertainer like none other!
It might all be part of her performance! Aaah,
she's so awesome!

text_block_list.name: Dark-haired Umamusume
text_block_list.text:
...I guess I can watch how she does for a little
longer.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: Yay! Everyone looks like they enjoyed the show!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: More importantly, she came, and she looked pretty pleased. That's a relief.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: But gosh, the Japanese Derby is seriously no joke!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: That really was some race...

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
It felt so good while I was running, though! I used
up every ounce of energy!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Her smile is genuine and filled with pure joy... But
there's something I want to confirm with her
before it's too late.
choice_data_list: Do you think you can do the Kikuka Sho?
Do you think you can do the Kikuka Sho?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I can't help but worry, considering her distance
aptitude makes it a bit reckless for her to take on
such a long race.
choice_data_list:
(But still, I have to respect what she wants to
do.)

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I wait for her to answer, ready to accept whatever
she says.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: When I think of it, I just... I feel so scared, and—

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: Ungh!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Fuji Kiseki covers her face with her hands and
starts crying. I rush to her side and start patting
her back to soothe her.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: Gotcha!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
When she looks up, she's wearing an elegant
Venetian mask like one would wear to a masked
ball.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Ahaha! Sorry, I just wanted to mess with you a
little! Were you surprised?
choice_data_list: That's one way to put it!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
If she's in a good enough mood to pull pranks,
then she must be fine.
choice_data_list:
Let's keep it up and do our best at the Kikuka
Sho.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: Hehe! You've got it!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: I barely managed the Japanese Derby.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
At 3,000 meters, the long-distance Kikuka Sho is
a stayer's stage.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
I know everyone is going to underestimate me
there.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
But that's why I want to turn their expectations on
their heads and overcome that wall in a stunning,
dramatic victory!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: Let's get even stronger this summer!
We set our sights on the Kikuka Sho.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Our race through the summer toward the Kikuka
Sho and the strong opponents waiting there
begins now!
